hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Golden rule reminder: before acting on this prompt, state your MODEL / EFFORT / MODE verdict per the golden rule in CLAUDE.md - this applies to every prompt, including pure discussion, with no exceptions."}}'
